hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Invoke the engineering-insights skill: before working in a module (client/server/reviewer-core/e2e) read its INSIGHTS.md first; re-read before adding an entry to avoid duplicates; at session end append only substantial NEW insights, append-only and never overwriting existing content."}}'

jq 'if (.stop_hook_active // false) then {} else {decision:"block", reason:"Session ending — run the engineering-insights capture step. For each module you worked in (client/server/reviewer-core/e2e), append only substantial NEW insights to that module INSIGHTS.md under the correct section heading. Append-only: never overwrite or edit existing entries. If nothing non-obvious happened that is not already recorded, write nothing and stop."} end'
